relations.note: The locked button radius is a specific, higher-precedence constraint on the CTA button within the layout rule.
Defines the background asset and the rare skip fallback; when skipped, layout color/radius rules remain unchanged.

quotes: A full-width banner where a **headline** and a **single button** are overlaid on the branded orange/yellow gradient image, both horizontally centered and stacked.
Always set a solid `background-color` of Sunshine `#faa31b` as fallback
**Headline** → Brand Blue `#00529b`, centered, sitting in the **top third**, Nunito Sans weight 800, ~28px, one line.
**Button** → centered, in the **lower-middle** below the headline. Fill Deep Blue `#003D74`, white label (Nunito Sans 800, 18px), with a Gold `#FFC20E` arrow `›` (24px)
### [IMPORTANT] Gradient Callout CTA Section Rule
A full-width banner where a **headline** and a **single button** are overlaid on the branded orange/yellow gradient image, both horizontally centered and stacked.

**Background** → the gradient PNG, applied as the section background, sized `cover`, `no-repeat`, centered, spanning the full content width (600px). Always set a solid `background-color` of Sunshine `#faa31b` as fallback
**Headline** → Brand Blue `#00529b`, centered, sitting in the **top third**, Nunito Sans weight 800, ~28px, one line.

**Button** → centered, in the **lower-middle** below the headline. Fill Deep Blue `#003D74`, white label (Nunito Sans 800, 18px), with a Gold `#FFC20E` arrow `›` (24px) after two non-breaking spaces. Size 248 × 64px.

rules.intent: Preserve the approved gradient callout CTA banner composition and color treatment.
rules.rule_text: The Gradient Callout CTA section is a full-width banner with a headline and a single button, both horizontally centered and stacked. Layout: the gradient PNG is the section background (cover, no-repeat, centered, spanning the full 600px content width) with a solid Sunshine (#faa31b) fallback background-color since clients like Outlook drop background images; section padding 48px 25px 56px 25px. Headline sits in the top third, Brand Blue (#00529b), centered, Nunito Sans weight 800 (ExtraBold), ~28px, one line, with 0 0 32px 0 padding. Button sits centered in the lower-middle below the headline: fill Deep Blue (#003D74), white label (Nunito Sans 800, 18px), Gold (#FFC20E) arrow '›' (24px) after two non-breaking spaces, size 248×64px.

quotes: `border-radius: 49.52px 1.76px 40px 1.76px;` — this four-value asymmetric radius is the signature shape and is **always required on every instance**

**Button radius (mandatory, never change):** `border-radius: 49.52px 1.76px 40px 1.76px;` — this four-value asymmetric radius is the signature shape and is **always required on every instance**, even when the background is skipped.
Never simplify it to a single value, swap the corners, or round the decimals.

rules.intent: Protect the signature asymmetric button shape from simplification.
rules.rule_text: The CTA button's four-value asymmetric radius (radius.cta.signature = 49.52px 1.76px 40px 1.76px) is the signature shape and is always required on every instance, even when the background is skipped. Never simplify it to a single value, swap the corners, or round the decimals.

quotes: do not re-host or recolor

asset is `https://solstice-public-forever.s3.us-east-1.amazonaws.com/design_library/12912e15-c371-4bf0-a5b9-08a7f8c57d20/7772aba5-1ff5-4985-80bf-c15b782111a4/Gradient_callout.png` — do not re-host or recolor. The background may be skipped **only in very, very rare cases** (plain-text/AMP fallback, a client that strips all images, a hard size budget). When skipped, the section still renders on a solid Sunshine `#faa31b` fill and every other rule stays identical.

If the background must be skipped, remove only `background-url`, `background-size`, `background-repeat`, and `background-position` — keep `background-color="#faa31b"` and the headline color, button color, and button radius exactly as above.

rules.intent: Lock the approved background asset and constrain when/how it may be omitted.
rules.rule_text: The gradient callout background asset (Gradient_callout.png at the specified Solstice S3 URL) must not be re-hosted or recolored. The background image may be skipped only in very, very rare cases (plain-text/AMP fallback, a client that strips all images, a hard size budget); when skipped, remove only background-url, background-size, background-repeat and background-position, keep background-color = Sunshine (#faa31b), and keep the headline color, button color and button radius exactly as specified — every other rule stays identical.
